question: How do I unlock a new character?
answer: You can unlock new characters by opening reward boxes and completing missions.

question: How do I save my progress?
answer: Open the game menu and make sure cloud save is enabled.

question: How can I earn more coins?
answer: You can earn more coins by completing quests and winning matches.

question: How do I level up faster?
answer: Play daily missions and participate in special events to gain more XP.

question: Can I play the game offline?
answer: Some game modes are available offline, but online features require an internet connection.

question: How do I change my character skin?
answer: Go to the customization menu and select the skin you want to use.

question: Why is the game lagging?
answer: Try lowering the graphics settings or closing background applications.

question: How do I join a multiplayer match?
answer: Open the multiplayer tab and select a game mode to start matchmaking.

question: How can I invite friends to my team?
answer: Use the friends menu and send an invitation to your friends.

question: How do I unlock achievements?
answer: Achievements are unlocked by completing specific challenges in the game.

question: How can I restore my purchases?
answer: Go to settings and click on the restore purchases option.

question: How do I report another player?
answer: Open the player profile after the match and click the report button.

question: Why can't I connect to the server?
answer: Check your internet connection and verify if the servers are online.

question: How do I upgrade my weapons?
answer: Collect upgrade materials and visit the upgrade station in the game.

question: Can I customize the controls?
answer: Yes, you can customize the controls in the settings menu.

question: How do I get free rewards?
answer: Log in daily and complete weekly challenges to receive free rewards.

question: How do I create a clan?
answer: Reach level 10 and use the clan menu to create your own clan.

question: How can I change the game language?
answer: Open settings and select your preferred language.

question: How do I unlock ranked mode?
answer: You need to reach level 15 before ranked mode becomes available.

question: Why did I lose my progress?
answer: Make sure your account is linked to cloud storage or a social media account.

question: How do I use voice chat?
answer: Enable voice chat in the audio settings and connect a microphone.

question: How can I get rare items?
answer: Rare items can be obtained during special events or from premium boxes.

question: How do I equip new items?
answer: Open your inventory and select the item you want to equip.

question: Can I transfer my account to another device?
answer: Yes, log in with the same account on the new device.

question: How do I complete daily challenges?
answer: Check the challenges menu and complete the listed objectives.

question: Why is my game crashing?
answer: Update the game to the latest version and restart your device.

question: How do I send gifts to friends?
answer: Open the friends menu and choose the send gift option.

question: How can I improve my rank?
answer: Win ranked matches consistently and avoid leaving games early.

question: How do I mute other players?
answer: Open the scoreboard during the match and select the mute option.

question: How do I contact game support?
answer: Go to the help section in settings and submit a support ticket.
